import React,{useState,useEffect} from 'react' import Head from 'next/head' import {Row, Col , List ,Icon ,Breadcrumb } from 'antd' import Header from '../components/Header' import Author from '../components/Author' import Advert from '../components/Advert' import Footer from '../components/Footer' import '../static/style/pages/list.css' import { CalendarOutlined,VideoCameraOutlined,FireOutlined } from '@ant-design/icons' import axios from 'axios' import servicePath from '../config/apiUrl' import Link from 'next/link' const MyList = (props) =>{ const [ mylist , setMylist ] = useState(props.data); // console.log('setMylist',props) useEffect(()=>{ setMylist(props.data) }) return ( <> Home
首页 视频列表
(
{item.title}
{item.addTime} {item.typeName} {item.view_count}人
{item.introduce}
 )} />
) } MyList.getInitialProps = async (context)=>{ let id =context.query.id console.log('111',servicePath.getListById+id) const promise = new Promise((resolve)=>{ axios(servicePath.getListById+id).then( (res)=>resolve(res.data) ) }) return await promise } export default MyList
